Hi Emmanuele, David here from the Global team. Quick one before tomorrow's call. We are moving the review to eleven, and I am going to share a new deck tonight. Two things I need from you. First, a short update on the Brazil numbers, just the headline, not every figure. Second, your main concern for the second half, so we can put it on the agenda. If anything is not clear on the deck, please do not stay quiet on the call. Just ask me to clarify. It is a long agenda and we are going to move fast, so it is completely fine to say, sorry, can you repeat that. See you tomorrow.

Okay everyone, we are almost out of time, so let me wrap up. Let me summarize the three action points. First, Emmanuele is going to send the Brazil update by Thursday. Second, the access team is going to follow up on the public market. And third, we are going to add the pricing question to the agenda for next week. It is too big for today, so let's take that offline. One last thing. If I explained anything too fast, please write to me. I am happy to clarify. Thank you all. Good meeting.

Sorry, Marc, I didn't catch that. Could you repeat the last part, please? And what do you mean by the new figures? Just to clarify, you need them by Friday? Let me think for a second before I answer. I have one concern, and I am going to follow up this week.
